name: valid multi-plane document with title, metadata, and preamble

3md: 0.1
axis: time
title: Week of June 22

Plan for the week. Each plane is a day; scrub the Z axis to move through time.

@plane z=0 label="Monday"
# Monday
- [ ] Standup at 9
- [x] Coffee

@plane z=1 label="Tuesday"
# Tuesday
- [ ] Lunch with design

@plane z=2 label="Wednesday"
# Wednesday
- [ ] Ship 0.1 tag
